hero.description: I design and develop modern, high-performance, and scalable web applications, combining elegant design, seamless user experience, and robust architecture.

about.description: A developer passionate about creating modern, high-performance, and scalable web applications. My approach combines a strong foundation in software engineering with a keen eye for visual detail to provide the best possible user experience.

problemSolving.title: Problem Solving
problemSolving.desc: I enjoy tackling complex challenges and designing elegant architectures to solve them optimally.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.desc: Every line of code is an opportunity to create a unique, modern, and impactful interactive experience.

passion.title: Passion for Development
passion.desc: Development isn't just a job for me; it's a true passion practiced daily with rigor.

learning.title: Continuous Learning
learning.desc: The web evolves fast. I continuously train myself to always leverage the latest innovations in modern stacks.

skills.desc: A complete mastery of a wide range of technologies to build end-to-end digital solutions.

p1.title: Centralized State Personnel Management System
p1.desc: Design and development of a web application for the centralized management of State personnel. (Internship project)

p2.title: Restaurant Order Management Application
p2.desc: Development of an application allowing food order management and restaurant operations tracking.

p3.title: Product Inventory Management Application
p3.desc: Creation of an application allowing product additions, list display, and visualization of a summary (min, max, total values) via a pie chart.

p4.title: Gas Station Management Application
p4.desc: Development of a fuel, customer service, and maintenance management system. Key features: CRUD operations, customer search, PDF receipt generation, low stock alerts, and statistics.

s1.title: Fullstack Web Development
s1.desc: Creation of complete web applications, from user interface to database architecture, using modern frameworks.

s2.title: REST API Creation
s2.desc: Design and development of robust, secure, and documented APIs to power your applications.

s3.title: React / Next.js Front-end Development
s3.desc: Integration of dynamic, responsive, and SEO-optimized user interfaces with the power of Next.js.

s4.title: Node.js / Laravel Back-end Development
s4.desc: Development of scalable, secure backend server architectures capable of handling large data flows.

s5.title: Modern UI/UX Integration
s5.desc: Meticulous translation of mockups into pixel-perfect code, with fluid animations and glassmorphism.

s6.title: Performance Optimization
s6.desc: Auditing and optimizing existing code, load times, technical SEO, and accessibility.
